mapper.sql: select item.sale_order_item_id, item.sale_order_id, item.product_id, item.location_id, item.batch_no, item.quantity, item.price, item.amount, ifnull(( select sum(outbound_item.quantity) from wms_outbound outbound left join wms_outbound_item outbound_item on outbound_item.outbound_id = outbound.outbound_id where outbound.status = 'audited' and ( outbound.sale_order_id = item.sale_order_id or ( outbound.sale_order_id is null and outbound.source_order_no = ( select sale_order.order_no from wms_sale_order sale_order where sale_order.sale_order_id = item.sale_order_id ) ) ) and ( outbound_item.sale_order_item_id = item.sale_order_item_id or (outbound_item.sale_order_item_id is null and outbound_item.product_id = item.product_id) ) ), 0) as outbound_quantity, greatest( ifnull(item.quantity, 0) - ifnull(( select sum(outbound_item.quantity) from wms_outbound outbound left join wms_outbound_item outbound_item on outbound_item.outbound_id = outbound.outbound_id where outbound.status = 'audited' and ( outbound.sale_order_id = item.sale_order_id or ( outbound.sale_order_id is null and outbound.source_order_no = ( select sale_order.order_no from wms_sale_order sale_order where sale_order.sale_order_id = item.sale_order_id ) ) ) and ( outbound_item.sale_order_item_id = item.sale_order_item_id or (outbound_item.sale_order_item_id is null and outbound_item.product_id = item.product_id) ) ), 0), 0 ) as remain_quantity from wms_sale_order_item item
mapper.select: where item.sale_order_id = #{saleOrderId} order by item.sale_order_item_id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into wms_sale_order_item
sale_order_id, product_id, location_id, batch_no, quantity, price, amount,
#{saleOrderId}, #{productId}, #{locationId}, #{batchNo}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{amount},
mapper.delete:
delete from wms_sale_order_item where sale_order_item_id in
#{saleOrderItemId}

delete from wms_sale_order_item where sale_order_id in
#{saleOrderId}
mapper.select:
select distinct sale_order_id from wms_sale_order_item where sale_order_item_id in
#{saleOrderItemId}
